title: Beta Learning Platform
author: Ether-to-the-moon-21
selftext:
Greetings, would anyone here be interested in testing a beta day trading learning platform? I am not trying to sell anything, just looking for real traders to give me brutal and honest feedback on my trading learning platform.  

Because a year ago, I decided to learn futures trading.

I lost money. Real money. Overleveraged positions, chasing moves, and burning through prop firm reset fees before I understood what I was actually doing wrong.

One year in — I'm still learning. I won't pretend otherwise.

But most trading education out there is designed to sell you something. Courses. Signals. Discord memberships. Lambos in the thumbnail.

So, I am building something different.

I'm a Senior Technology Program Manager and I combined my background in technology and systems thinking with everything I've learned the hard way — and built a free trading curriculum from scratch.

It covers:

* What leverage actually means before you touch a live account
* How institutions move price — and why retail stops always get hit
* Market structure, premium/discount zones, Smart Money Concepts
* Risk management principles that keep you alive long enough to get good

It's in early beta — rough around the edges and still being built out. But the foundation is there and I'm looking for honest feedback from anyone willing to spend 30 minutes going through it.

If you're curious about futures trading, financial literacy, or just want to see what a PM builds when he goes down a trading rabbit hole — let me know! Drop a comment or DM me, thanks!
